ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Southern Asia, Northern Africa) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the statistic belongs to */,
  "surface_area_km2" REAL /* Surface area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_2017" INTEGER /* Population of the country in 2017 (in thousands) */,
  "population_density_2017" REAL /* Population density of the country in 2017 (per square kilometer) */,
  "sex_ratio_2017" REAL /* Sex ratio of the country in 2017 (males per 100 females) */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population of the country in 2020 (in thousands) */,
  "population_2023" INTEGER /* Population of the country in 2023 (in thousands) */,
  "urban_population_percentage_2017" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas in 2017 */,
  "literacy_rate_2017" REAL /* Literacy rate of the country in 2017 (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "gdp_2017" REAL /* GDP of the country in 2017 (in million current US dollars) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate_2017" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country in 2017 (annual percent change) */,
  "gdp_per_capita_2017" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country in 2017 (in current US dollars) */,
  "gdp_2020" REAL /* GDP of the country in 2020 (in million current US dollars) */,
  "gdp_2023" REAL /* GDP of the country in 2023 (in million current US dollars) */,
  "unemployment_rate_2017" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country in 2017 (percentage) */,
  "inflation_rate_2017" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country in 2017 (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "forested_area_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of forested area in the country */,
  "co2_emissions_2017" REAL /* CO2 emissions of the country in 2017 (in million tons) */,
  "protected_areas_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the country's land that is protected */,
  "biodiversity_loss_rate" REAL /* Rate of biodiversity loss in the country */,
  "water_stress_index" REAL /* Water stress index of the country (0-5, where 5 is the highest stress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy-related indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "energy_production_2017" REAL /* Energy production of the country in 2017 (in petajoules) */,
  "energy_supply_per_capita_2017" REAL /* Energy supply per capita of the country in 2017 (in gigajoules) */,
  "renewable_energy_production_2017" REAL /* Renewable energy production of the country in 2017 (in petajoules) */,
  "fossil_fuel_consumption_2017" REAL /* Fossil fuel consumption of the country in 2017 (in petajoules) */,
  "energy_imports_2017" REAL /* Energy imports of the country in 2017 (in petajoules) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health-related indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "population_using_improved_water_2017" REAL /* Percentage of population using improved drinking water in 2017 */,
  "population_using_improved_sanitation_2017" REAL /* Percentage of population using improved sanitation facilities in 2017 */,
  "life_expectancy_2017" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in the country in 2017 (years) */,
  "health_expenditure_per_capita_2017" REAL /* Health expenditure per capita in the country in 2017 (in current US dollars) */,
  "child_mortality_rate_2017" REAL /* Child mortality rate (under 5 years) in the country in 2017 (per 1,000 live births) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
